heading: Lease of facilities and lands to non-Federal public bodies
label: 460l–15 Lease of facilities and lands to non-Federal public bodies
text: At projects, the construction of which has commenced or been completed as of , where non-Federal public bodies agree to administer project land and water areas for recreation and fish and wildlife enhancement purposes and to bear the not less than one-half the costs of operation, maintenance, and replacement of existing facilities serving those purposes, such facilities and appropriate project lands may be leased to non-Federal public bodies.July 9, 19651So in original. The word “the” probably should not appear.1
notes: Amendments1992— substituted “not less than one-half the costs of operation” for “costs of operation”.Pub. L. 102–575
amendments: Amendments1992— substituted “not less than one-half the costs of operation” for “costs of operation”.Pub. L. 102–575
